reviews.comment:
Grandes descuentos en combustibles para los socio y una oficina que expide registros internacionales con muchísima velocidad. Es importante recordar llevar las fotos 4 x 4 para no tener que pagarlas ahí

(Translated by Google)
Great fuel discounts for members and an office that issues international driver's licenses very quickly. Remember to bring your 4x4 photos so you don't have to pay for them there.

reviews.comment:
Tiene 5 estrellas porque nosotros usamos los servicios la nafta con descuento del 5% de descuento en cada carga y con Banco Itau otro descuento ademas tengo el seguro del auto, y usamos los recreos del delta y el camping de San Clemente

(Translated by Google)
It has 5 stars because we use the services, the gasoline with a 5% discount on each fill-up and with Banco Itau another discount. I also have car insurance, and we use the Delta recreation areas and the San Clemente campsite.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZaU9qaElnEAE

reviews.comment:
Terrible, me dejaron 15 minutos esperando porque llegue 5 minutos antes del cambio de turno. No me ofrecieron limpiar los vidrios y la Serviclub no la tomaba

(Translated by Google)
Terrible, they made me wait 15 minutes because I arrived 5 minutes before the shift change. They didn't offer to clean the windows and the Serviclub wouldn't accept my payment.
